scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w web
scripts.build:server: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w web
